chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4573 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.19316/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 4 3. For order on Misc. No.19317/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 25.9.2025 Sardar Shabbir Sultan advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. Learned counsel for the petitioner has filed complaint before the I.G. Police Sindh on 04.9.2025, claiming that certain police officials are causing harassment to the petitioner. The I.G. Police Sindh is directed to decide the complaint of the petitioner within three months of the date of this order. A copy of this order shall be sent to the I.G. Police Sindh alongwith complaint, which is page 9 of the file, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
